prompt: An ethereal anime illustration of a {argument name="character type" default="young anime witch"} sleeping peacefully on a soft pillow, tucked under a voluminous, starry blanket that seamlessly blends into a bed of clouds. She has round glasses and flowing {argument name="hair color" default="pastel rainbow"} hair. She is wearing a large, floppy witch hat and matching pajamas, both featuring a vibrant {argument name="clothing pattern" default="colorful galaxy camouflage"} pattern. The background is a deeply magical cosmic night sky filled with sparkling stars, illuminated by a bright star at the top center and framed by {argument name="background element" default="intricate glowing magical filigree forming a crescent moon"}. The scene is highly detailed and luminous, characterized by a soft, dreamy atmosphere and an {argument name="overall color palette" default="deep blues and luminous purples"} color palette.
translatedPrompt: 一张空灵的动漫插画，描绘了一位 {argument name="character type" default="年轻动漫女巫"} 正在柔软的枕头上安详入睡，身上盖着蓬松的星空毯，毯子与云床无缝融合。她戴着圆框眼镜，留着飘逸的 {argument name="hair color" default="柔和彩虹色"} 头发。她戴着一顶巨大的软塌塌的女巫帽，穿着配套的睡衣，两者都带有鲜艳的 {argument name="clothing pattern" default="彩色星系迷彩"} 图案。背景是充满魔法的宇宙夜空，繁星闪烁，顶部中央有一颗明亮的星星照耀，周围环绕着 {argument name="background element" default="构成新月的精致发光魔法花丝"}。画面细节丰富且明亮，呈现出柔和梦幻的氛围，并采用 {argument name="overall color palette" default="深蓝色和明亮的紫色"} 的整体色调。

breakdown.creativeCore: 沉睡的动漫星空女巫：生成一张梦幻般的动漫插画，描绘了一位在星光熠熠的宇宙背景下沉睡的魔法角色。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
